_note: Project registry per docs/architecture/project-vault.md. Tracks every project Nick owns — AA-managed and external. Each entry maps to a repo and (optionally) a team. The single index of 'what projects exist'.

projects.name: Shared Workspaces
projects.description: Shared lightweight repo. Sub-folders by team or topic (wharfside-bulletins/, personal-assistant/, etc).

projects.name: Concurrent 3280 — Museum Report + Jersey Stack Video
projects.description: Museum-grade research report (InfoAge / VCF) plus Jersey Stack-style YouTube video on Concurrent's last great pre-RISC mini. Primary-source heavy; Nick co-op'd at Concurrent in 1985.

projects.name: Monmouth Beach: Sand, Scandal, and the Shore
projects.description: 7:51 documentary on Monmouth Beach NJ history (Lenape, land pirates, Life-Saving Service, Robeson scandal, Galilee, rum-runners, Hurricane Sandy). Shipped unlisted; archived to Drive.

projects.name: 12 Days of Terror: The Real Story Behind Jaws
projects.description: 1916 Jersey Shore shark attacks documentary. Archived in-progress; recipe in git history at AgentArchitect.

projects.name: Why Are We Building Data Centers in Space?
projects.description: 35-scene documentary on ocean vs space data centers. Draft v7 reached; archived per Project Vault decision (pull back later if Nick decides to ship).

projects.name: Seven Presidents Park: The Myth and The Shore
projects.description: Documentary on Seven Presidents Oceanfront Park (NJ). Published as 'The Jersey Beach That Lied About Its Presidents' on Vistter Two.

projects.name: The Complete History of Massapequa, New York
projects.description: 10:37 documentary, assembly complete (Mar 10); never published. Archived per Project Vault decision; pull back if Nick decides to apply review feedback (scenes 3,4,6,7) and ship.

projects.name: NyQuil Costs $12. These 3 Pills Cost $0.47.
projects.description: Cold Plan video — published live. Companion to cold-plan-app.web.app. Batch 1 + Batch 2 shorts campaign tied in.

projects.name: Batter Up: The Last Piece of Jolly Roger
projects.description: V10 uploaded unlisted, waiting on family review + photo permissions before making public. Simoncic removed per family. Archived in current state.
